creator: decke@FreeBSD.org
text:
We are definitely running a bit late (we should run around NETWORKING) but pf is much earlier which is correct and it has not changed in the rc.d script for a long time. You can check the order yourself:

rcorder /etc/rc.d/* /usr/local/etc/rc.d/*

But even changing the startup order will not fix your incorrect pf.conf for you.
